Description: The post [Kerry Group’s Shane McGibney on how Copilot is his knowledge partner](https://news.microsoft.com/source/emea/features/kerry-group-copilot-knowledge-partner/) appeared first on [Source](https://news.microsoft.com/source).
EnhancedContent:
Shane McGibney has worn many hats during his 20-plus year career at [Kerry Group](https://www.kerry.com/), the Irish company utilizing biotechnology and food sciences to supply more than 18,000 specialised ingredients to food, beverage and pharmaceutical makers all around the world.

He added another when he was named both Business President with responsibility for Transformation, and CEO of Kerry’s Biotechnology Solutions business, overseeing forward-thinking food solutions like enzymes and probiotics, while simultaneously leading the way as Kerry looks to sharpen its competitive edge across businesses and functions.

“There’s quite a variety in the content of my role and quite a variety in terms of my responsibilities,” McGibney says. “One day I could be talking about a global business services process review for supply chain. The next day I could be talking about a new fermentation process for a product.”
Author: stclarke
Title: Kerry Group’s Shane McGibney on how Copilot is his knowledge partner
